ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the weather data entry */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "max_wind" REAL /* Maximum wind speed in km/h */,
  "min_barom" REAL /* Minimum barometric pressure in mbar */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation level in mm */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the weather station */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the weather data category */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Measure of the quality of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Method or device used to collect the data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the weather station at the time of data collection */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the weather station at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES weather_data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the weather station was established */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the category */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store specific permissions for the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the user's research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the team leader */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
